title: Am I Ready? Communication Readiness Checklist
description: 30-item self-assessment checklist to gauge your communication readiness. Includes a 4-month development plan with weekly action items and milestones.
questions_it_answers: Am I ready for the job market from a communication perspective?
What communication skills do I need to develop?
How can I improve my communication in 4 months?
What should I focus on this week?
